title: Litchi Honey Citrus Sparkler
method: Stir honey with lime juice till it dissolves.
whyItWorks: Bright citrus enhances the honey's delicate floral-litchi notes while keeping the drink light, crisp, and refreshing.

title: Litchi Honey Tropical Salad
method: Toss chopped fruits and greens together.
Whisk olive oil, lime juice, and litchi honey into a dressing.
whyItWorks: Litchi honey adds delicate sweetness that enhances tropical fruits without overpowering their fresh, vibrant flavours.

title: Litchi Honey Yogurt Bowl
method: Top with berries, almonds, and chia seeds.
Finish with a generous Drizzle of Litchi honey.
whyItWorks: The floral honey complements creamy yogurt beautifully, adding light sweetness while keeping the bowl wholesome and refreshing.

title: Coconut Lime Cooler
method: Shake coconut water, lime juice, and Litchi honey together.
whyItWorks: The tropical freshness of coconut and lime pairs naturally with the subtle floral notes of Litchi Honey.

title: Litchi Honey Malai Toast
method: Toast the bread in a frypan.
Spread chilled Malai over warm toast.
Top with fruits of your choice.
whyItWorks: The creamy malai and fresh fruits pair beautifully with the subtle floral sweetness of the honey.

title: Litchi Honey Glazed Roasted Carrots
method: Roast carrot strips with olive oil and salt until tender.
Drizzle warm Litchi honey before serving.
whyItWorks: The honey lightly caramelises the carrots while its floral notes keep the dish refined and fresh.

title: Litchi Honey Overnight Oats
method: Combine oats, chia seeds, milk, and Litchi honey.
Top with sliced bananas and nuts.
whyItWorks: Litchi honey adds natural sweetness and subtle fruity floral notes to this creamy, nourishing breakfast.

title: Litchi Honey Shrikhand
method: Whisk hung curd with cardamom, saffron, and Litchi honey until smooth.
whyItWorks: Litchi honey gives shrikhand a lighter sweetness and delicate floral aroma that feels elegant and refreshing.
